title: senecio subpubescens
intro: Senecio subpubescens, also known as the Dwarf Fireweed or Alpine Fireweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio subpubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. The herbal preparations of Senecio subpubescens typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as poultices or salves.
